creator: andrew@ugh.net.au
text:
OK, here is a patch to add -Wall to the Makefile.

--- Makefile.orig	Tue Jun 19 21:00:39 2001
+++ Makefile	Tue Jun 19 20:52:18 2001
@@ -2,6 +2,7 @@

 PROG=   bs
 MAN=   bs.6
+CFLAGS+=-Wall
 DPADD=  ${LIBNCURSES} ${LIBMYTINFO}
 LDADD=  -lncurses -lmytinfo
 HIDEGAME=hidegame
